topic: Cost of living — Huddersfield vs London
title: Huddersfield or London?
instruction: Look at the prices and choose the correct answer.
context: Monthly rent: Huddersfield £750 | London £1,800. Weekly food shop: Huddersfield £80 | London £110. Bus pass (monthly): Huddersfield £55 | London £165.

questions.question: How much more expensive is London rent per month?
How much does a London bus pass cost per year?
What does 'cost of living' mean?
options: How much it costs to live in a place
questions.answer: How much it costs to live in a place

questions.question: Which city is more expensive to live in overall?
